allow: Bash(DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer xcodebuild -project KeyMinder.xcodeproj -scheme KeyMinder -configuration Debug -derivedDataPath build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=YES build)

Bash(sleep 2; echo "--- still running? ---"; pgrep -lf "KeyMinder.app/Contents/MacOS" || echo "NOT RUNNING"; echo "--- recent crash reports \(should be none\) ---"; ls -t ~/Library/Logs/DiagnosticReports/KeyMinder* 2>/dev/null | head -3 || echo "none")
